title: ImportOperation
description: A record tracking the processing status of a single resource within an import request.

id.description: System-generated unique identifier for the operation.

version.description: Current version of the import operation record.

importContainerKey.description: Key of the container this operation belongs to.

resourceKey.description: User-defined key of the resource being imported.

state.description: Current processing state of the import operation.

resourceType.description: The type of resource being imported.

errors.description: Validation or processing errors if the operation failed.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the operation was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the operation was last modified.
